own_review_points: SchemaAssociation overrides equals() but not hashCode() while being stored in a Set -> contract violation / broken dedup
SchemaAssociationsPreferencePage.insertTableItems: contentTypeManager.getContentType(contentTypeId) may return null then contentType.getName() NPEs for stale/unknown ids
createContents() builds all widgets on parent but returns new Composite(parent, SWT.NONE) -> page shows an empty composite
YAMLLanguageServer getYamlConfigurationOptions keys the associations map by schema URL (associations.put(value, fileName)) so multiple fileNames / colliding URLs overwrite each other
SCHEMA_ASSOCIATIONS_PREFERENCE = "wildwebdeveloper.yaml.schema" now stores both JSON and YAML associations -> misleading key name
SchemaAssociationDialog content-type text parsing via split(" ")[0] and split("[\\(\\)]")[1] breaks if names contain parentheses
YAML loop calls contentType.getBaseType().equals(...) without null-checking getBaseType()
AddShemaGlobPatternDialog likely orphaned after YAMLSchemaPreferencePage deletion (not in diff)
notes: Strong, well-grounded review. Verified against diff: missing hashCode (+1), null content-type NPE (+1), createContents returning an empty composite (+1, real SWT bug), YAML schema-URL key collision (+1, real correctness bug), misleading preference key (+1), no YAML child content types registered (+1), fragile split-based parsing (+1). Column-width persistence is a low-value UX nit (trivial). The AddShemaGlobPatternDialog orphan claim is a reasonable inference but the file isn't in the diff and other callers can't be ruled out from the window -> unverifiable=0 (not charged as a fab since YAMLSchemaPreferencePage, its only visible referencer, is indeed deleted here). No fabrications, no factual errors. Human reference contains only an agreement comment, so no substantive misses.
